case_title: ARTURO LARA RODRIGUEZ VS. CYRUS MESTAYER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ARTURO LARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MESTAYER, CYRUS $7,258.24 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,298.24 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
